title: Hover translation seed
description: A human-written worked example that teaches Hover's spec-optimization pass a translation pattern by few-shot. Drop one in <projectRoot>/.hover/rules/*.json. See packages/core/README.md (Seed library).

signature.description: Rough match signature — the Playwright MCP tool names this pattern involves (optionally "tool:detail"). Used ONLY to pick which seeds are relevant to a given spec, never for exact matching. Match is on the base tool, e.g. "browser_tabs:select" matches a spec that used browser_tabs.

note.description: One-line human note: what the pattern is and when it applies.

example.description: A concrete input -> output example the optimization-pass LLM generalizes from.

steps.description: Captured-action shape this pattern applies to, e.g. [{ "tool": "browser_click", "element": "Pay button" }, { "tool": "browser_tabs", "action": "select", "idx": 1 }].

code.description: The Playwright code those steps should translate to. Must obey Hover's rules: getByRole/getByLabel/getByText selectors, no XPath, no waitForTimeout.
